no-restricted-syntax.message: Do not read or write document.cookie directly. Use the handoff endpoint for session-establishing state. See specs/021-embedded-login/contracts/login-page-contract.md §4.2.
Do not persist credentials or session state to localStorage. See specs/021-embedded-login/contracts/login-page-contract.md §4.2.
Do not persist credentials or session state to sessionStorage. See specs/021-embedded-login/contracts/login-page-contract.md §4.2.
